message:
Add Cargo.lock to pin dependency versions

Lock file generated from the workspace Cargo.toml, pinning exact versions
of all direct and transitive dependencies. Committed because the workspace
contains a binary crate (fsqlite-cli), following Cargo's recommendation to
track lock files for reproducible builds of applications.

Key pinned versions:
- thiserror 2.0.x (error derive macros)
- serde 1.0.x + serde_json 1.0.x (serialization)
- bitflags 2.9.x (type-safe bitflags)
- smallvec 1.13.x (stack-allocated vectors)
- memchr 2.7.x (SIMD string search)
- parking_lot 0.12.x (synchronization)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
